mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ent_enterprise_setting WHERE enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ent_enterprise_setting ( enterprise_id, enterprise_address, unit_address, postal_code, fax, legal_representative, legal_phone, enterprise_contact, enterprise_mobile, enterprise_email, compiler_contact, compiler_name, compiler_mobile, compiler_email, energy_cert, cert_authority, cert_pass_date, registered_capital, registered_date, industry_category, industry_code, industry_name, superior_department, unit_nature, energy_enterprise_type, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, deleted ) VALUES ( #{enterpriseId}, #{enterpriseAddress}, #{unitAddress}, #{postalCode}, #{fax}, #{legalRepresentative}, #{legalPhone}, #{enterpriseContact}, #{enterpriseMobile}, #{enterpriseEmail}, #{compilerContact}, #{compilerName}, #{compilerMobile}, #{compilerEmail}, #{energyCert}, #{certAuthority}, #{certPassDate}, #{registeredCapital}, #{registeredDate}, #{industryCategory}, #{industryCode}, #{industryName}, #{superiorDepartment}, #{unitNature}, #{energyEnterpriseType}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, NOW(), #{updateBy}, NOW(), 0 ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE enterprise_address = VALUES(enterprise_address), unit_address = VALUES(unit_address), postal_code = VALUES(postal_code), fax = VALUES(fax), legal_representative = VALUES(legal_representative), legal_phone = VALUES(legal_phone), enterprise_contact = VALUES(enterprise_contact), enterprise_mobile = VALUES(enterprise_mobile), enterprise_email = VALUES(enterprise_email), compiler_contact = VALUES(compiler_contact), compiler_name = VALUES(compiler_name), compiler_mobile = VALUES(compiler_mobile), compiler_email = VALUES(compiler_email), energy_cert = VALUES(energy_cert), cert_authority = VALUES(cert_authority), cert_pass_date = VALUES(cert_pass_date), registered_capital = VALUES(registered_capital), registered_date = VALUES(registered_date), industry_category = VALUES(industry_category), industry_code = VALUES(industry_code), industry_name = VALUES(industry_name), superior_department = VALUES(superior_department), unit_nature = VALUES(unit_nature), energy_enterprise_type = VALUES(energy_enterprise_type), remark = VALUES(remark), update_by = VALUES(update_by), update_time = NOW(), deleted = 0
